title: Frontend auth pages
description: Register and login UI, connected to the above APIs.

subtasks.title: Registration form
subtasks.description: Form with role toggle (passenger/driver) that conditionally shows license/organization fields for drivers.

subtasks.title: Login form
subtasks.description: Simple email/password form with error state handling (invalid credentials, pending approval).

subtasks.title: Auth context/hook
subtasks.description: Client-side useAuth() hook/context to expose current user + role across the app, and handle redirect-after-login by role.
